ogTitle: Booleroo Centre vs Boolgun: Climate Safety

heading: Booleroo Centre vs Boolgun — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Booleroo Centre, South Australia and Boolgun, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolgun has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Booleroo Centre (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Booleroo Centre or Boolgun safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Booleroo Centre has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Boolgun scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Booleroo Centre scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Boolgun scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Booleroo Centre or Boolgun?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolgun has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
